# Expense Tracker Flutter Project Setup

## Project Overview
Flutter Expense Tracker Application with complete CRUD operations, state management, form validation, and responsive UI.

## Checklist

- [x] Project Requirements Clarified - Flutter app for expense tracking
- [x] Create Expense Model and Data Structure
- [x] Build Main Application UI with StatefulWidget
- [x] Implement Add Expense Dialog with Validation
- [x] Implement Expense List with ListView.builder
- [x] Implement Delete Expense Functionality
- [x] Add Total Expenses Calculation
- [x] Add Empty State UI
- [x] Style with Cards and Responsive Design
- [x] Documentation Complete - README.md and project configuration files created

## Project Structure
```
lib/
├── main.dart              # App entry point
├── models/
│   └── expense.dart       # Expense data model
└── screens/
    └── home_screen.dart   # Main home screen
```

## Running the Project
```bash
flutter pub get
flutter run
```
